commands.review_summary:
The PR threads filename values through outbound sends toward Feishu and adds Feishu sendPayload/local file upload handling, while also carrying unrelated CI, CODEOWNERS, local docs/scripts, skills, and lockfile changes.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was established. Source inspection does show the current send path does not carry a filename to Feishu, while the PR head demonstrates the intended path and the regressions it introduces.
commands.review_followup: Contributor and maintainer action is needed to strip unrelated/security-sensitive changes, fix the Feishu regressions, resolve conflicts, and add redacted real behavior proof; automation should not repair this PR while proof is missing.
